channel.title: vim on Prasad Ghole
channel.description: Recent content in vim on Prasad Ghole

item.title: Installing spacemacs on windows
item.description: Installing spacemacs on windows Once we install vanilla emacs from gnu website we want to do little twick for running emacs configuration when we run runemacs.exe command. We need to find out where is emacs startup home directory path. Finding startup directory Check user emacs directory CTRL-H v Enter variable name user-emacs-directory Cloning spacemacs configuration When ever emacs starts it looks for startup directory in user emacs directory found above.

item.title: Vim Tips
item.description: Search in visual mode Follow the steps: Select visual mode by V or select block or column by using CTRL_V Press escape to exit visual mode Search / as you do for regular search

item.title: I love vim (bindings)
item.description: Even though you know vim is my first choice as editor in some situation we can’t use vim as standalone application. But not to worry vim keybindings are now available In this post I am listing all the vim bindings I am using. Vrapper for Eclipse Vim for Visual Studio code FakeVim for QT Creator Evil for emacs Online code editors

item.title: Vim Plug in
item.description: Well time has come to install vim plugins for using more advance features of vim. There are lots many options available but I choose vim plug being simple and easy to use. Installation Github repo has all necessary details for installing so I won’t repeat here. Plugins I use fzf Fuzzy finder vim surround vim multiple cursor vim git gutter vim airline vim nerdcommenter emmet vim slumlord cvim
